title: Experiments on Properties of Hidden Structures of Sparse Neural Networks
authors: Not specified in the provided text
contributions: A PyTorch tool called 'deepstruct' for Sparse Neural Networks
A genetic neural architecture search enhanced with structural performance prediction
A comparison of magnitude-based pruning on feed-forward and recurrent networks
An original correlation analysis on recurrent networks with biologically plausible structural priors from social network theory
Performance prediction results on these recurrent networks

methodology.definition: Sparse Neural Networks (SNNs) are defined as neural networks with a low proportion of connectivity
methods: Experiments on automatic methods to obtain hidden structures: pruning, neural architecture search, and prior initialization
Structural performance prediction to speed up neural architecture search methods

results: The paper discusses sparsity definitions and metrics
Motivation for sparsity in neural networks
Sparsity can lead to lower number of parameters, lower computations, specialized hardware, compression, and reduced memory footprint

references.description: Related to hardware efficiency and robustness
